original_abstract: Adapting large language models (LLMs) to specialized downstream tasks relies heavily on efficient fine-tuning. However, implementing these techniques across diverse model architectures often requires significant manual effort and deep technical expertise. We introduce LLAMAFACTORY, a unified framework designed to streamline and democratize the fine-tuning process for over 100 LLMs. By integrating a suite of state-of-the-art efficient training methods, LLAMAFACTORY allows users to flexibly customize models without writing code, primarily through its intuitive web interface, LLAMABOARD. We provide empirical evidence of the framework's efficiency and performance across language modeling and text generation benchmarks. Since its release, LLAMAFACTORY has gained significant traction in the open-source community, surpassing 25,000 stars and 3,000 forks on GitHub. The framework is available at: https://github.com/hiyouga/LLaMA-Factory.
humanized_abstract: Fine-tuning a large language model (LLM) for a particular downstream task is usually a quick step. However, tuning LLMs to perform different tasks for various applications across different models requires much of human labor, technical expertise. This is when a framework for “efficiently fine-tuning large language models for different downstream tasks efficiently” can benefit everyone. We built a so-called LLAMAFACTORY, a (Unified) Tuning Platform allowing the user to quickly fine-tune more than 100 LLMs in an effective and automatic manner via employing the recent advancements in efficient training, namely knowledge distillation (KD), label-smoothing and synthetic data generation techniques. Through employing the advanced methods as part of its toolbox, this unified framework of “FFusing diverse LLMs to many Downstream Tasks” easily supports the speed up and full automation of fine-tuning (as an example shown via demo in 8 seconds using LLAMABOARD, which is an accompanying user-friendly GUI that sits on top of the Factroy; hence enabling the users to quickly tailor different models to match up to their many customized applications fast and effortlessly. Our experimental results and the strong evaluations that demonstrate both its training and test performances on few benchmark tasks, including language modeling, text summarization, text rewriting exemplify the efficiencies and the applicability of this method. Since our open source code was released in Aug 2023, it obtained over 25k stars and over 3k forks in the github. The current LLAMAFACTORY implementation can be downloaded from https://github.com/hiyouga/LLaMA-Factory.

Through employing the advanced methods as part of its toolbox, this unified framework of “FFusing diverse LLMs to many Downstream Tasks” easily supports the speed up and full automation of fine-tuning (as an example shown via demo in 8 seconds using LLAMABOARD, which is an accompanying user-friendly GUI that sits on top of the Factroy; hence enabling the users to quickly tailor different models to match up to their many customized applications fast and effortlessly. Our experimental results and the strong evaluations that demonstrate both its training and test performances on few benchmark tasks, including language modeling, text summarization, text rewriting exemplify the efficiencies and the applicability of this method. Since our open source code was released in Aug 2023, it obtained over 25k stars and over 3k forks in the github. The current LLAMAFACTORY implementation can be downloaded from https://github.com/hiyouga/LLaMA-Factory.
